body_transformation: The rounded head retains its butterfly silhouette but now features a soft ivory white base with delicate lavender geometric patterns tracing the blue accents. The large wings transform into translucent crystalline structures with starlight silver veins, their intricate purple and blue patterns replaced by glowing petal gold filaments. The red eye coloration shifts to luminous starlight silver orbs with white pupils, and the legs gain a smooth, petal-textured texture. Subtle star-shaped markings appear on the face, complementing the new crystalline wing veins.
signature_feature: Wings: translucent crystalline with starlight silver veins and glowing petal gold filaments.
